✨Here’s to a packed Downtown Winston Weekend! Where will you be? ✨

FRIDAY, MAY 8th 

📍 Music in Merschel: Spring Lunch Series 12-2pm downtownwinstonsalem theramkat 
📍 wstalliance Ain’t Misbehavin’ NOW - May 17th 
📍 sawtoothschool Soirée Anniversary Gala 6-11pm *Ticketed Event* 
📍 hanesbrandstheatre James & Joel 7:30-8:30pm
📍 fiddlinfishbrewing NBA & NHL Playoffs 7pm

SATURDAY, MAY 9th 

📍 Bailey Park SummerLark Concert: The Fray 7pm
📍 alleyofthearts Makers Market 12-4pm
📍 kaleideum MESStival 12-5pm *Ticketed Event*
📍 winstonvintagemarket 11am-5pm 
📍675 W 5th St 
📍 wisemanbeer Free Cornhole Tournament 7pm
📍 krankiescoffee Spring Fling & Clothing Swap 4-7pm
📍 eastoftexaswsnc Mothers Day Market 2-5pm
📍 theporchws Mothers Day Flower Bar 12-2pm
📍 radarbrewingcompany Vegan Seafood Pop Up 12-4pm
📍 roar.ws Summer Lemon Drop Fest 12-7pm
📍 millersontrade One More Song 9-10pm
📍 fiddlinfishbrewing Stella’s Rescue Adoption Event 12-4pm

SUNDAY, MAY 10th 

📍 wisemanbeer Angelo’s Artisan 10th Annual Mothers Day Market 12-5pm
📍 thedutchlightbar Paint & Sip All Day & 
Mothers Day Brunch with native.root 10:30am-1pm 
📍 etethestudio Got It From My Mama (Mat)cha Bar 
📍 divebarwinston Moms Mothers Day Craft Open-8pm
📍 radarbrewingcompany Happy Mothers Day $10 Flights & $6 Mimosas 
📍 rideunitedws Moms Ride Free 

Comment below where you’ll be this weekend!

Hey DTWS, we have a new FRESH juice bar! Come out to the Grand Opening of The Jugo Bar today at 6pm! thejugoman 

🍏 Owner William Fulton is a Winston-Salem local and makes all of the juices on-site with “no junk, just juice” 

🍊 The Jugo bar serves fresh cold-pressed juice, tea, mushroom coffee, smoothies and smoothie bowls 

📍411 W. 4th St. #141

✨Here’s to a packed Downtown Winston Weekend! Where will you be? ✨

FRIDAY, APRIL 24th 

📍 kinandcottage Spring Cleaning Super Sale NOW - May 1st! 
📍 thecratedigandchill at thecmpndnc 6-10pm 
📍 Salsa Dancing with Soncarbie 7-11pm $10 Cover 
📍 Bailey Park Park Hangs: Blue Cactus FREE 6-8pm innovationquarter 
📍 10th Annual NC Fine Wines Awards Gala at themillenniumcenter 6:40-9:45pm *Ticketed Event* 
📍 Music in Merschel: Spring Lunch Series 12-2pm downtownwinstonsalem theramkat 
📍 riverrunfilm International Film Festival 

SATURDAY, APRIL 25th 

📍 alleyofthearts Makers Market 12-4pm
📍 radarbrewingcompany Food Truck: Send it Sammies 5-9pm
📍 wisemanbeer Fruhlingsfest 8am-Midnight 
📍 divebarwinston Sip & Swap: Plant Meet 12-2pm 
📍 joymongers_winston Live Music 7-10pm 
📍 theramkat Silent Disco Dance Party: B2B 8-9pm *Ticketed Event* 
📍 radarbrewingcompany Music Bingo 3-5pm 
📍 stem_beverage_and_supply Saturday Night Live with DJ Fish 8pm-12am 
📍 kaleideum Little Innovators: Engineer It 10:30-11:30am 
📍 riverrunfilm International Film Festival 
📍 millersontrade Live Music 9:30pm
📍 roar.ws Reggae on the Roof 

SUNDAY, APRIL 26th 

📍 thedutchlightbar Bar Sunday Funday Candle Making Workshop 3-4pm
📍 radarbrewingcompany Free Live Music 3-5pm
📍 fiddlinfishbrewing Local Ladies Market Mother’s Day Edition 12-5pm 
📍 theramkat Comicade 2026 11am-12pm *Ticketed Event* 

Comment below where you’ll be this weekend!

#DTWS #FinditHere

events.title: 🤝 Music in Merschel: Spring Lunch Series
events.description:
📢‼️ Music in Merschel: Spring Lunch Series starts this Friday, April 17th from 12-2pm ‼️

💜 Grab some lunch or a coffee and head to Merschel Park (122 W. 4th St.) to enjoy some tunes during your lunch break

🎶 This week’s music features kudzu222 // Jazz Trio

💚 This is a brand new programming event created to utilize Merschel Park and showcase local talent that will run every Friday until June 5th. Swipe —> or click the link in our bio to see the full lineup!

events.title: 🤝 Opening Weekend - Dash Baseball
events.description:
⚾️ Play ball! Opening Weekend with the wsdashbaseball is finally here, and we couldn’t be more excited for another unforgettable season at the ballpark! 🎉

From the crack of the bat to the smell of ballpark favorites, there’s something for everyone this year. Be sure to check the link in their bio for:
🎟️ Single-game tickets now on sale
🎓 College student passes
👧 The 2026 Kids Dash Club
🚗 Parking prices and season passes
…and so much more!

🍔 Come hungry! The Dash have revamped their menu items and offerings, and each of the three main concession windows features something different, so take a lap and explore them all before deciding on your game-day bite.

🎆 Stick around after the game for fireworks, and don’t forget that kids under 12 can run the bases once a waiver is signed, making it the perfect family outing.

Here’s to sunny days, hometown pride, and a season full of Dash baseball. ⚾️💙

events.title: 🤝 Downtown Winston-Salem Walking Treasure Hunt
events.description:
🔍🕵️‍♀️Explore Downtown Winston-Salem on a walking treasure hunt! 

💰💵 Simply download the Xplorer Treasure Hunts mobile app, complete the hunt, and be entered for a chance to win a $100 gift card to a downtown business! Use activity code “wsalem” to play for free! Link in bio for deets 

🗓️ Treasure Hunt will be live until April 30th!

💵 **Ten winners will be drawn for a $100 gift certificate

🎥: triangletreasurehunt 
#DTWS #FinditHere

events.title: 🤝 Weekday Lunch Specials
events.description:
📍 istanbulgyroandburger (216 W. 4th St.) 

Weekday lunch specials are Monday–Friday 11am - 4pm starting at just $9.95 
(yes… we love a good deal 👏)

Stack your plate with:
🥙 Beef + chicken gyro combo plates
🌯 Lavash wraps
🍔 Cheeseburger & chicken burger combos
🥗 Fresh, flavorful salad options

And don’t even think about skipping dessert…
🍰 Tiramisu, chocolate cake, fruit cake
✨ Pistachio dream & Dubai chocolate cake
🍯 Turkish baklava + cannolis
🍦 Rotating ice cream flavors

Basically… come hungry, leave happy 🤝

events.title: 🎵 Chris Knight with special guest Mich Harrison
events.description:
Pleased to welcome chrisknightmusic back to The Ramkat on October 9, 2026, with special guest micharrison4! Doors at 7 PM, show at 8 PM.

Tickets go on sale at 10 AM Eastern this Friday, May 22, at TheRamkat.com! 

After 28 years as a recording artist, singer-songwriter Chris Knight remains boldly empowered to make music that always delivers the unflinching truth. 
That brutally honest, no-frills philosophy fits his Americana-fueled, backwoods-grown merger of folk, country, and rock. It’s been at the backbone of nine studio albums, beginning with 1998’s acclaimed self-titled debut and traveling through scorchers such as the one-two punch of 2001’s A Pretty Good Guy and 2003’s The Jealous Kind, two demo-styled discs (2007’s The Trailer Tapes and 2009’s Trailer II), and the recent, electric guitar-fortified opus, 2019’s Almost Daylight. #chrisknight #micharrison #theramkat #wsnc #supportlivemusic

events.title: 🎵 Paul Thorn at The Ramkat
events.description:
Excited to welcome paulthornmusic back to The Ramkat on October 2, 2026! Doors at 7 PM, show at 8 PM.

Tickets go on sale at 10 AM Eastern this Friday, May 15, at TheRamkat.com! 

When it comes to songwriting, less is more, and simplicity is strength. Just ask Paul Thorn, who’s spent three decades turning soulful grooves and small syllables into songs that pack a big wallop. Maybe he learned the power of minimalism from his years as a pro boxer; maybe it just comes naturally. But whether he’s targeting heads, hearts, hips or the occasional funny bone, he somehow manages to condense large nuggets of wisdom into tight little mantras, the kind embroiderers stitched onto pillows before internet memes existed.

Thorn’s new album, Life is Just A Vapor, contains some beauties: “Life is a vapor, let’s live it while we can”; “tough times don’t last, but tough people do” (from “Tough Times Don’t Last”); “any mountain up ahead is just a hill” (from “Old Melodies”). They’re words of advice, comfort, support, encouragement, often meant to uplift, especially in times of struggle.

“I like for people to be touched by music and get something from it, something that they can take with them throughout the day,” Thorn says. “Every song on this album, there's a message in it of some sort about how to live life.” #paulthorn #theramkat #wsnc #supportlivemusic

events.title: 🎨 ADWS Annual Meeting
events.description:
ART CRUSH is evolving, and we’re doing it with intention.

This year, we’re focusing on fewer, more thoughtfully planned events to create stronger experiences for artists, attendees, and the businesses that make the Arts District of Winston-Salem thrive.

Here’s what 2026 looks like:
🌈 May – Color the District
🏙️July – Winston-Salem Weekend
🎉 September – Hispanic Heritage Month
🛍️ November – Arts District Celebration

Each event is designed to feel meaningful, vibrant, and well-supported, with clearer themes, deeper engagement, and more space to do things really well.

What’s new for artists:
We’re introducing a $25 participation fee with 35 paid artist spots per event, plus 5 scholarship-funded spots for emerging artists. This helps sustain ART CRUSH while keeping access and opportunity at the center of what we do.

One more shift:
We’re moving away from annual memberships. Artists can now participate event by event: simple, flexible, and clear. (Full details coming to our website soon!)

Want the full story?
Join us for the ADWS Annual Meeting at chadschai 
📅 February 27 | ⏰ 6:00–7:30 PM

Come curious. Bring a friend who’s new to ART CRUSH. Stay for the conversation.​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​

events.title: 🎨 Kerry Butler Acting Through Song Masterclass
events.description:
Fresh off their Junior Theatre Festival run, look what our rising sTArs have coming up next! ta.rising.stars 

✨ An unforgettable experience is coming to Winston-Salem! ✨

🎭 Tony Award-nominated Broadway star Kerry Butler is headlining an exclusive Acting Through Song Masterclass & Rising sTArs Broadway Cabaret hosted by Theatre Alliance Rising sTArs! 🌟

Kerry Butler has graced the Broadway stage originating roles in Beetlejuice, Mean Girls, Xanadu, Little Shop of Horrors, Catch Me If You Can, Hairspray, and so many more! 🌟 From Broadway to TV, she’s done it all! 📺

🎤 In this masterclass, eight performers will work one-on-one with Kerry and all attendees will receive invaluable tips on audition techniques, character development, and vocal performance. PLUS, there will be a Q&A! 🙌

🎶 After the class, join Kerry and local performers for a one-night-only cabaret event featuring show-stopping performances and behind-the-scenes stories from the Broadway world. 🎭✨

Want to sing on stage with Kerry? 🎤 Registration for the masterclass includes a ticket to the cabaret and the chance to perform LIVE! 🎶💥

📅 Masterclass: March 8th, 2026 | 1-5 PM
📍 Location: Juxtaposition Studios, Winston-Salem, NC
🎟️ Registration Fee: $75 | Register at link in comments 

🌟 Cabaret: March 8th, 2026 | 8 PM
📍 Location: Winston-Salem Theatre Alliance
🎟️ Tickets: $25 | Get yours here:  https://theatrealliance.ws/box-office/

Don’t miss your chance to learn from one of Broadway’s brightest stars! ✨

#KerryButler #BroadwayMasterclass #TheatreAlliance #RisingStars #WinstonSalemEvents

events.title: 🎨 This Side of Crazy
events.location: The Beall Theatre at Theatre Alliance - 651 Pilot View St NW Winston Salem, NC 27101
events.description:
Don’t be an outsider looking in! Enjoy a matinee with us this Saturday!

“This Side of Crazy,” by Del Shores, is next in Theatre Alliance’s Beall Theatre! When three feuding sisters are summoned home by their popular gospel-music composing mother to perform one final musical concert, old tensions flare, and the outcome is anything but blessed and holy! Grab a front-row seat to the latest by the southern writer who brought us “Sordid Lives,” “Southern Baptist Sissies,” and “The Trials and Tribulations of a Trailer Trash Housewife!”

September 20 and 27 at 12 PM and 3 PM

Tickets: $15

Get them here: https://theatrealliance.ws/box-office/

Rated R for language, sexual content, mature subject matter

LOCATION: The Beall Theatre at Theatre Alliance - 651 Pilot View St NW Winston Salem, NC 27101

Signature Drink: The Sandi Patti

Running Time: 2 hours, with one 15-minute Intermission

(same physical building as Ihrie Theatre, but the entrance is on Pilot Street- free parking in the upper lot adjacent to the building. (The Centenary lot beside our building.))

Pictured: Katy Carroll

Photos: Neil Jester - Fine Art Photography

events.title: 🎨 Hairspray
events.location: Winston-Salem Theatre Alliance’s Jamie Lawson Auditorium, 650 W Sixth Ave, Winston-Salem, NC
events.description:
Back to Baltimore tonight for “Hairspray!” Tonight’s forecast for rain presents an ideal opportunity to stay dry and enjoy an evening with a multi-Tony-Award-winning musical!

“Hairspray” bursts onto the Theatre Alliance stage in September!  If you aren’t familiar with this colorful confection of a show, you should be!  Follow 1960s teeny-bopper Tracy Turnblad and her friends and family as they navigate the fight for civil rights and everyone’s right to dance, because “You Can’t Stop The Beat!” Arguably featuring one of the best, high-energy scores in several decades, “Hairspray” is a show that celebrates the best in all of us!

Performing these dates at Winston-Salem Theatre Alliance’s Jamie Lawson Auditorium, 650 W Sixth Ave, Winston-Salem, NC:

September 12-13, 19-20 at 7:30 PM
September 14 and 21 at 2 PM
ADDED: September 26 and 27 at 7:30 PM

Free parking onsite!

Tickets: https://theatrealliance.ws/box-office/

Pricing: $25/$23

Rated PG-13 for innuendo, mild language 

Run time: 2 hours, 15 mins with one Intermission 

Signature Drink: Edna’s Elixir

Season Sponsors: 
Lewis & Keller Attorneys
YES! Weekly

Photo: Neil Jester - Fine Art Photography

events.title: 🎨 The Prince of Egypt
events.location: Winston-Salem Theatre Alliance, Jamie Lawson Auditorium, 650 West 6th St, Winston-Salem, NC
events.description:
“The Prince of Egypt” plays today at 7:30 PM at Sunday at 2 PM!

Immerse yourself in this family-friendly, Biblical epic about Moses’ quest to deliver his people. Don’t miss it!

🎶 With a sweeping score by legendary composer Stephen Schwartz—the genius behind Wicked, Pippin, and Godspell—The Prince of Egypt transforms the story of Moses into an unforgettable theatrical experience.

From the palaces of Pharaohs to the parting of the Red Sea, this epic musical is powered by music that moves both heart and soul.

🎭 The Prince of Egypt storms the stage this summer at Theatre Alliance!

📅 August 8–17, 2025

🎟️ Tickets: $25 Adults | $23 Students, Seniors & Military  Get tickets here: https://theatrealliance.ws/box-office/

📍 Winston-Salem Theatre Alliance, Jamie Lawson Auditorium, 650 West 6th St, Winston-Salem, NC —Free parking onsite!

🔖 Rated PG – perfect for families and fans of epic storytelling

Signature Drink: Red Sea 

Season Sponsors: Lewis & Keller Attorneys, YES! Weekly

Photos: Neil Jester - Fine Art Photography

#PrinceOfEgypt #StephenSchwartz #EpicMusicals #BroadwayLegend #wstheatrealliance

events.title: 🎨 The Shark is Broken
events.location: Beall Theatre at Theatre Alliance (upper level, upper parking lot), 651 Pilot View St, Winston-Salem, NC
events.description:
Break a Leg to our Cast and Crew of “The Shark is Broken,” opening this afternoon in the Beall Theatre at 3 PM and also playing Sunday at 5:30 PM! (Missing from photo are Jeremy Engel, Alex Fredwall, and John Wilson).

The first summer blockbuster movie is being filmed—but no one working on the film would know it. Dive deep into the tumultuous, murky waters of the making of a major motion picture with testy, feuding costars, unpredictable weather, and a shark prop whose constant breakdowns are looking like an omen for the future of the movie. In this comedy co-written by Ian Shaw and Joseph Nixon, the short tempers of Jaws stars Robert Shaw (father of co-writer Ian), Richard Dreyfuss, and Roy Scheider take center stage as they bond, argue, drink, gamble, and pray for an end to the shoot, not knowing it will change their lives forever

Make a double-feature of It and catch “The Prince of Egypt,” also playing this weekend!

The Beall Theatre at Theatre Alliance (upper level, upper parking lot), 651 Pilot View St, Winston-Salem, NC

Saturday, Aug 16 at 3 PM
Sunday, Aug 17 at 5:30 PM
Saturday, Aug 23 at 3 PM and 5:30 PM

Photos: Neil Jester - Fine Art Photography

Tickets: https://theatrealliance.ws/box-office/dl

events.title: 🛍️ Vintage Market
events.description:
2 weeks away from our next event!🌎

Saturday June 6th we will be hosting 20+ vintage clothing, accessories, and decor vendors at our usual spot. 

Food by latingrillonwheels 
Coffee by grandmascoffeellc 

Expect to find 1,000’s of vintage and secondhand items! Change up your summer fits and shop with us! 

Have you been to our event before?
Here are some tips to help you:

1) Have different forms of payment ready. Most vendors accept Venmo, Zelle, Cashapp, Tap to Pay, but your safest bet is cash. 

2) Ask to try things on, all sales are final so make sure you are happy with your item before purchasing. 

3) it’s summer time so bring a hat and some comfy clothes. Our vendors will have tents to help with shade to help with the sun. 

We hope to see you there! 

#vintagemarket #ncevents #winstonsalem #northcarolina #thrift

events.title: 🛍️ WVM Spring Outdoor Market
events.description:
2 weeks away from our next event! 

WVM is back with a spring outdoor market! 

🌸Event Details:

📍675 W 5th St, Winston Salem, NC
📆 Saturday May 9th 11-5pm
🎟️Free admission Free parking

This month we are having prettyinpink_cafe at our pop up!
Sip on your favorite drink to fuel your shopping! 

latingrillonwheels will be joining us as well. 

🌎Have you been to one of our events before?
Here is what to expect:

• We will be hosting 20+ vendors. Each vendor will bring tons of secondhand items not just clothes; You can find jewelry, accessories like purses and belts, and home decor. 

• Each booth is independently owned. We are all small businesses, just make sure to check out with the vendor before walking to a new booth. 

• Most vendors ask that you try things on before buying. There will be canopy fitting rooms and restrooms to try on items. All sales are final. 

That’s pretty much it. We will have a limited amount of totes for sale as well as a restock of our WVM stickers!

events.title: 🛍️ WVM 2 Year Anniversary Vintage Market
events.location: Incendiary Brewing at Bailey Park, 486 N Patterson Ave, Winston Salem, NC
events.description:
Come out and celebrate 2 years of WVM!
Tomorrow Saturday April 4th from 12-5pm

📍486 N Patterson Ave, Winston Salem, NC
Incendiary Brewing at Bailey Park

💙Tips and Information:

•We have 25+ vintage clothing and accessories vendors !
Jewelry by honestjewelers 

•Our vendors will have all sorts of styles and price points. You will find anything from a $10 rack to premium vintage goods!

•We are giving away new WVM totes to the first 50 customers!

⭐️Have you shopped with us before? If not here are some tips:

1) Each booth is its own separate entity. Make sure to check out with that vendor before walking away

2) Bring a reusable bag to carry your purchases. Our goal is to limit waste.

3) Shop early and don’t hesitate! Vintage items are typically 1 of 1. It is more than likely you will never see that item again!

4) Vendors accept Venmo, Zelle, Cashapp, Cash, and/or Tap to Pay
  Each vendor is different so make sure to ask what form is best. Cash makes things easier !

That’s pretty much it! I hope this helps in planning your trip tomorrow! There are tons of food options and coffee in the area! 

We will see you there!

events.title: 🛍️ Outdoor Pop Up Market
events.description:
2 weeks away from our next outdoor pop up market!

Catch us on Saturday March 14th from 11-5pm !
There will be 20+ vintage clothing and accessory vendors, 
Drinks by _matchamamas , and food by latingrillonwheels 

Event details:
📍 675 W 5th St, Winston-Salem, NC
🎟️ Free admission Free parking
📅 Saturday March 14th, 11-5pm

Check out the link in our Bio! We have free stickers !

This is a 1 day only event! 
Cook up and outfit, bring a friend, and we’ll see you in 2 weeks✌️

What is WVM:
We are a monthly vintage and secondhand clothing market. Our vendors curate tons of secondhand items every month; items like carhartt and nascar jackets, coach purses, belts, jewelry, shoes, decor, and so much more. 
Our goal is to bring new people into the secondhand world! By doing so we save tons of articles from textile/land waste which in turn helps our environment! 

We can’t wait to see you!

events.title: 🌈 Alphabet Movie Night: K for Kids - Into the Spiderverse
events.location: LGBTQ Center of Durham Warehouse on Hunt
events.description:
ABCDEFGHIJ “K” for Kids this Alphabet Movie Night we will be gathering at the lGBTQ Center of Durham Warehouse on Hunt for a Kid & Family Film. We will be watching the Marvel animated feature “Into the Spiderverse!” This Saturday the 30th of May at 6:30pm we will all be friendly neighborhood SpiderFans!

We will have seats and popcorn a plenty, but please bring a blanket or pillow if you are a floor person. Also Pajamas and Stuffies always welcome, so you can make the transition from the movie to the bed that much easier! 

Hope to see yall soon! 

*Note: this movie , and our subsequent feature, were selected by audience members whom attended the last feature! So please join us and help us select the films you'd like to see.

#family #lgbtq #queer #kidsmovie #familyfun #community #pajamaparty #popcorn

events.title: 🌈 Monthly POC Trans Support Group
events.description: If you're a person of color Trans or gender nonconforming community member, join us for our Monthly POC Trans Support Group to discuss your trans experience and normalized joy in your life. The support group meets the last Wednesday of each month from 5 to 7 PM.

events.title: 🌈 Pride Celebration
events.description:
Its pride month and we're ready to be OUT on the block! Calling all ages of youth and families in our communities come celebrate Pride with us June 13th ! Activities and fun for kids 0-24 (and their families) including drag, face painting, arts and crafts, performances, and more!

#PrideMonth #lgbtq #youth #family #downtownDurham #durhamnc

events.title: 🌈 Welcome in Wednesday: Flower Pressing/Pet Rock
events.location: LGBTQ Center of Durham, 114 Hunt St
events.description:
Put Some Play in your Day!

Welcome in Wednesday with Stormie Daie, meetups for youth 5-12, and families held at the LGBTQ Center of Durham at 114 Hunt St and participating community spaces.  This is your chance to engage the children in the LGBTQ Durham community by sharing space and activities together. Welcome in Wednesday will prioritize fun through social gathering and activities emphasizing nature, science, sharing, education, reading, and hands on crafts.

This time will serve to create connections amongst youth and families and strengthen community ties with and amongst younger lgbtq folks and their families.

As well we will inform the children and families with the happenings of the LGBTQ Center through partnerships with likeminded groups and community partners.

For questions, concerns, registration or interest in sponsoring/supporting Welcome in Wednesday, contact Stormie Daie at sdaie@lgbtqcenterofdurham.org

4/15 -  Flower Pressing/Pet Rock
4/22 -  Terrarium
4/29 - Tea Party
5/6 - Kiteing
5/13 - Face Paint
5/20 - Dress Up Tea Party
5/22 - Show and Tell Talent Show

*activities are subject to change due to weather and space/supply needs

This is not child care, parents or guardians or care takers are expected to be present.

events.title: 🌈 Alphabet Movie Nite: Space Jam
events.description:
Let's get reeling and rolling for our first “Alphabet Movie Nite” here at the Queerhouse Theater. This first screening is “K” for the Kids with all ages welcome! 

We will be watching the 90s multimedia sports comedy animated classic “Space Jam,” starring NC’s very own, plus all your favorite cartoon athletes - and hosted by Durham's own, Stormie Daie! 

Screening is at May 9 at 6:30pm with a runtime of 1:30min. Space is ample but seating is limited so please bring a blanket or lawn chair if possible. 

Also feel free to bring your best stuffie and wear your best pjs so you can crawl home and get in bed promptly after the finish of the film! 

Popcorn provided. Feel free to bring outside meals/snacks for you and yours.

Come early - parking is limited, primarily street parking.

events.title: 🌈 Black Trans Short Film Festival
events.description:
We’re proud to partner with Comfrey Films for the Black Trans Short Film Festival—an inspiring celebration of bold, culture-shifting films by Black trans, gender non-conforming, and intersex filmmakers.
Register for free to join us at the Black Trans Short Film Festival in Durham, NC April 30-May 2nd. comfreyfilms.org/festival 

Can’t make it to Durham this month? Get your ticket to BTSFF virtual! 
This year’s theme, “We are free now,” centers storytelling that does not ask for permission—stories that are shaping culture, building community, and imagining new possibilities for the future.
The Black Trans Short Film Festival features a dynamic lineup of film screenings, filmmaker conversations, and community events that celebrate emerging and established voices in Black trans media.
Join us in supporting these incredible artists and experiencing the power of their work.
🎬 Learn more and get tickets: comfreyfilms.org/festival
We hope to see you there!

events.title: 🌈 Comfrey Films Black Trans Short Film Festival
events.description:
TDOV RECAP

Let's Reminisce on our Trans Day of Visibility Weekend last month! This was a partnership between BLMP SONG TLC and The LGBTQ Center of Durham. The weekend started with a Trans Short Film Screening in partnership with Comfrey Films and concluded with our Annual TDOV Tea. 

Don't forget to check out the Comfrey Films Black Trans Short Film Festival this weekend! 

officialblmp ignitekindred comfreyfilms translawcenter

events.title: 🌈 Free Eye Van - In Her Vision Eye Examinations
events.description:
We are excited to once again host the free eye van! make an appointment, then join us at our new location - 118 Hunt Street!

In partnership with the LGBTQ Center of Durham, Dr. Besharat brings the In Her Vision team on-site to the LGBTQ Center of Durham from 12AM to 4PM on Friday, May 1.

They provide comprehensive eye examinations assessing ocular and physical health, in addition to prescription glasses, at no cost. Thanks to their partnership with Durham Tech, they can transport medical equipment to meet communities where needed.

They assess the physical and mental health of the people we serve through the holistic framework of somatics. To best utilize her time, we ask that you sign up for a specific session/appointment. 

All patients require a consent form, and for those patients under 18 years of age, a parental consent form is required. Paper copies will be available the day of. This is at no cost to you. No insurance information is collected.

registration link: bit.ly/MaySight
Email for more information: info@lgbtqcenterofdurham.org

#community #caringforoneanother #vision #accesstohealth #sight #clarity #empower #uplift #seeingclearly #sightmatters

in_her_vision dtmobilehealth

events.title: 🌈 Pride Festival for Kids, Youth, and Families
events.description: We need your help! We are hosting a pride festival for kids, youth, and families on June 13th (mark your calendars!) at our new location! We need your help choosing a name! Follow the link in our bio to vote! (click the "Sprout" link in our bio and then on this image).

events.title: 🌈 Be Gay with Raye: Front Porch Fridays in May
events.description:
🌈 Be Gay with Raye: Front Porch Fridays in May 🌈

Date(s): May 1, May 8, May 15, May 22, May 29
Time: 12pm
Location: 114 Hunt Street

Come share tea 🫖 (and maybe spill a lil' 🫟) with Co-ED Raye Dooley. This is a space for community members to connect with Center leadership - whether it's to dream, scheme, or offer feedback, you're welcome on our porch. Dad jokes will abound. 🤭

events.title: 🤝 Pride Party
events.description:
Save the date!! One of our favorite parties is back, and this time we're celebrating Pride! DJs VSPRTN and Fifi Hi-Fi will be curating vibes of sapphic longing and celebration all night. These parties have sold out in the past, so get your tickets in advance! Link in bio.

9pm-1am, and you know we'll have the dance floor packed by 9:30 :)

events.title: 🤝 Dyke Night Pride Pre Ga(y)me
events.description:
she’s baaacckkk 💋

our annual Dyke Night Pride Pre Ga(y)me is BACK for it’s third year!!! 🥳✂️🩷

come out and party with us and the always gorgeous djtausi!!! 

low-sensory hours from 6-8:30 for the queers who wanna mingle and party without the dancing crowds. we’ll be playing some sweet chill music for you to kiss and sip to🥂

events.title: 🤝 Beginner Hand Sewing Demo and Mending Workshop
events.description:
TOMORROW! 🪡

River Takada (rivtak) (she/they) will be walking around helping trouble shoot your mending projects, and words of encouragement and tops of how to practically mend your texts. 

At 7:15 they’ll be doing a beginner hand sewing demo! 

Needles, thread, random fabric scraps, and scissors will be provided.

Bring 1-2 textile (clothing, bag, patching) mending projects you would like to ask questions about and get started on! 

NO hemming and alteration projects please! 

BYO zippers, buttons, matching thread or fabric for patching, etc. 

It’s still craft night, so other craft projects are welcome to come and mingle with the sewing! 

(Free event but tips for River are always welcome!)💸

events.title: 🤝 Forever Barbara Screening
events.location: Full Frame Documentary Film Festival, Durham
events.description:
Arcana is proud sponsors of the Full Frame Documentary Film Festival happening this weekend in Durham!! 

There are some great documentaries happening this weekend, but we’re especially excited for Friday’s screening of Forever Barbara: 

Feminist icon and lesbian filmmaker Barbara Hammer’s life mission was to create and record lesbian histories, both personal and societal. With Hammer’s own voice as our guide, Barbara Forever weaves elements from her personal archive—films, home movies, photos, audio recordings—and interviews with her longtime partner, Florrie Burke, to create an expansive portrait of its subject. 

playing at 7:30! tickets at fullframefest !!! 

Stop in before or after the screening for a springtime cocktail! If you pop in after, you might catch Ally J and Kevin Clark’s set!!

events.title: 🤝 Meka La Crème's Birthday Celebration
events.description:
Making friends as an adult feels like a herculean task, so we’ve made it easy with mannny fun events this week to come mingle with other durham queers! 

Tomorrow we have our in house diva, meka_la_creme’s birthday celebration!!!!! Come out and party with some live burlesque performances all in celebration of Meka (NO COVER, bring $$ to tip performers) 

If you wanna mingle some more, we have queer craft night & lesbian poetry club this week on tuesday and sunday respectively!! 

We also have live music this week with many many may long time friends: Emily & Itsi, Ally & Kevin, and Les Trios Chats!!! some folk, acoustic, and live jazz!!! so fun! 

come make new friends, come hang out!!

events.title: 🌈 Crossdress to Impress: A Gender Bending Party
events.location: Kings Raleigh, 14 W Martin St (Second Floor)
events.description:
The Arena Presents Crossdress to Impress A Gender Bending Party 

Drag + DJs + Clothing Vendors

June 6 | Kings Raleigh 
14 W Martin St (Second Floor)
10pm to 2am 
18+
$10 Pre Sale | $15 Door 

In the spirit of pride month we are holding space for act of cross dressing and gender expression. This is the time to try something new or wear that article of clothing you feel you can’t anywhere else! 

Crossdress to impress invites you to have fun with your fashion and gender at the same time! Shop some local vendor clothing and listen to Sex on Decks & DJs Mas Kalina (Más Culina and Kali Fuchis) all night from 10pm to 2am 

Pop up Drag Performances 
By Aurora & Eevee Dulce 

12 am Runway Moment

events.title: 🌈 Pride Kickoff at Flex
events.description: Flex is being queenofflipss to Raleigh for Pride! No cover. Join flexnightclub on June 25th to kick off Pride weekend 🌈

events.description: Get ready! Durham is about to be graced with the presence of Miss Tina Knowles, mother to Beyonce, entrepreneur, fashion designer, and New York Times Best Selling author of Matriarch! Get your tickets for an opportunity to hear her speak on May 2nd in Durham

events.title: 🌈 GAG RETURNS
events.description: This Saturday - GAG RETURNS 🪩 Join the party clubera_bullcity and durhamfruit alongside nightlife icons Amanda Lepore and Susanne Bartsch 💋 This two floor dance party features music by Boyyyish (NYC) Arra (NYC) Steven J (Raleigh) and Sypha (Durham)! Hosted by Naomi Dix and Trey Roberts | Tickets can be found at durhamfruit.com

events.title: 🌈 Lana Ja'Rae Performance at Legends Raleigh
events.description: It’s true lanajarae from RuPaul’s Drag Race is coming to legendsraleigh this Saturday! Get 25% off m&g and show tickets by using RALEIGHPRIDE promo code at checkout! Tickets can be found at Legends instagram or at legends-club.com 🪩 She’ll be performing alongside thechloecassidy itschantecassidy Giselle Cassidy Carter and Paris Brooks Bonet 💃

events.title: 🌈 Susanne Bartsch & Amanda Lepore Performance at Durham Fruit
events.description: The Queen of NYC Nightlife, Susanne Bartsch and trans icon, model, personality and performer, Amanda Lepore are touching down in North Carolina in nearly 10 days! See them perform alongside returning Raleigh Pride performers boyyyish and stevenjofficial 🌈 Tickets are available at durhamfruit.com and attendees will be first to see what Pride may have in store for June 👀

events.title: 🌈 Stevenjofficial's Birthday at Flex
events.description: Join us as we celebrate stevenjofficial birthday at Flex this Saturday! Steven will be the very special guest DJ — come dance join in on the fun 🪩

events.title: 🌈 Girls Night at the Underground
events.description: Feeling the cabin fever? This Thursday come join the girls at the Underground — featuring our favorite Oak City Kitty thechloecassidy, nicktoday_aidatomorrow and mizmarshamellows

events.title: 🌈 TRAMP Dance Party
events.description:
GAG! is launching a dance party on January 9th! TRAMP was created in response to the community for a dance party — a raw, no disruptions, nonstop music dance party where you can dance freely. Once Bitter Social opened, a new downtown bar by the makers of Bitter Sweet and Johnson Street Yacht Club, it became clear this space was made for just that!

This small intimate space creates a different vibe from any GAG party that promotes getting closer with each other; whether it’s dancing or conversing in one their dark corners.
GAG is bringing two special guest DJs, featuring, Pisces Prince (Gaven Simon) from NYC — featured in So.Gay in 2025 and GHO3 SPINZ from GAG to Death this past Halloween, will pump up the BPMs FOR EVERYONE tramping on the dance floor!

Not only is it a premiere of a new party — but it serves as a birthday celebration of GAG producer, Trey Roberts!

events.title: 🌈 GAG Halloween Warehouse Party
events.description: GAG has announced the return of their 3 room warehouse party for Halloween. October 31st — gag_raleigh takes over durhamfruit and clubera_bullcity for a queer dance party you won’t forget. Starring Armana Khan, Vice, Daniel and Julie J — all coming from NYC! Tickets at durhamfruit.com

events.title: 🌈 GAG, Queen City Pride Celebration
events.description: Charlotte! Our favorite pride celebration is getting the Queen City treatment! 👑 GAG, Queen City is coming for cltpride with special guest arrietty_theelf 🧝‍♀️ August 15th, 2025 at fillmorenc 🪩 Get your tickets now at Livenation.com

events.title: 🌈 Stranger Brother
events.description: This Saturday catch “Stranger Brother” - an indigenous short film that follows Adam, a queer indigenous man whose world is shaken when his younger brother unexpectedly arrives. You can check it out as part of the sundanceorg indigenous film tour that’s part of the triangle_native Film Festival at the Rialto

events.title: 🌈 Raleigh Premiere Screening: 'It's Not You. It's Me: Chicago!'
events.description:
🎬 Are you single, ready to mingle, and working to heal? Kick off your 2026 Pride Weekend in the Triangle with an exclusive screening of the new award-winning relationship, dating, and mental health docuseries that's creating international buzz!

Hosted by Out! Raleigh Pride and the LGBT Center of Raleigh, join us for an evening of singly mingling, intimate viewing, insightful conversation, and colorful celebrations for the Raleigh premiere screening of "It's Not You. It's Me: Chicago!"

This award-winning queer dating and mental health docuseries is making international waves and now it’s coming to Raleigh for one night only! Bring your boo, your bestie, or both! You don't want to miss this!

Proceeds support the completion of the series and continued services at the Center ❤️

events.title: 🌈 One Light, Many Colors
events.description:
One Light, Many Colors will be meeting again this evening, Thursday, May 7th from 7 - 8:30 PM! 

One Light, Many Colors is an affirming space for our LGBTQ+ community to explore faith and spirituality without pressure or judgement. Through open and guided conversations we talk about belief deconstruction, healing and what it means to reclaim your faith on your own terms.

Please complete the interest form in our bio if you are interested in attending for the first time. Check it out and share with a friend!

We’ve got the games covered and masks ready too. You’re always welcome to bring your own favorite games as well. Parking is easy with free street parking after 6pm and the parking deck free for the first two hours.

Grab your friends and come play with us! All are welcome and we can’t wait to see you there 💛🕹️

events.title: 🌈 Cause-Play
events.description:
We're only a few days away from Cause-Play! This event will have a curated gallery with cosplay photography with PeterLikesPhotography for sale benefitting the Center, a photobooth with @‌capturedbyneash so you can have professional cosplay photos, and AAPI-owned vendors The Bean Flower, Sapphic Space, and Ecovate 3D. Enjoy Boba by The Bean Flower, 3-D printing from Ecovate 3-D, and t-shirt screen printing with Sapphic Space. Don't have t-shirts for screen printing? The Center has plenty! Cosplay and costumes HIGHLY encouraged, with a prize for the best dressed!

Grab your ticket using the link in our bio! Use code “HALFOFF” to save!

events.title: 🤝 The Wiley Fosters Last Show
events.description:
Today, we’re sharing sad news. After almost seven years, Mystery Brewing Company will be closing its doors at the end of the day on October 31st.
.
.
This has been an incredibly difficult decision. We’ve always been undercapitalized, and it’s been a struggle to operate for some time now. We’ve suffered a string of pretty bad luck over the past couple of years: equipment failures, construction and permitting delays, storm-related outages and losses. The end result is that we can no longer afford to operate.
.
.
Over the course of the next week, we’ll be doing the best we can to celebrate everything we love about Mystery to give it a fond farewell, releasing some favorite old beers that we’ve had kicking around in the back of the cooler, and trying to say goodbye the best way we can. If you get a chance, please come and visit us, say hi, and enjoy a pint, a meal, or a night of music for the last time. The Wiley Fosters – our amazing house band – will be playing our last show at the pub on the evening of October 27th.
.
.
We’re enormously proud of the community that has grown up around Mystery, and we’ll miss being here every day for Hillsborough.
.
.
With one last raised glass,
.
.
Erik Lars Myers
Founder, Brewer, CEO
Mystery Brewing Company

events.title: 🤝 The Sunday Show (Stand-up Comedy)
events.description: Today’s #BeerChurch is dogfishhead’s Palo Santo Marron (2015). An unfiltered, unfettered, unprecedented brown ale aged in handmade wooden brewing vessels. The caramel and vanilla complexity unique to this beer comes from the exotic Paraguayan Palo Santo wood from which these tanks were crafted. Palo Santo means "holy tree," and its wood has been used in South American wine-making communities. This highly roasty and malty brown ale clocks in at 12% ABV. Pub is open from 11:30 AM - 10 PM, and The Sunday Show (free) stand up comedy starts at 8 PM! #hillsboroughNC

events.title: 🤝 Live music from writeplayrepeat
events.description: It’s a soup & sandwich kind of day. Head to the Pub for our Short Rib & Pumpkin Cassoulet with white beans, tomatoes, herbs, and leeks. We also have five sandwiches on the October menu including the Edamame Pate with local sprouts, cucumbers, roasted peppers, arugula, and herb aioli on sourdough. We had to postpone the savinggracenc adoption event due to weather, but the Pub is still open all day! Live music from writeplayrepeat tonight at 8:30 PM! See you in #HillsboroughNC.

events.title: 🤝 Saving Grace NC Meet and Greet
events.description: **THIS EVENT HAS BEEN POSTPONED DUE TO WEATHER!** We’re hosting savinggracenc on the back patio at the Pub on Saturday! Come enjoy a pint and meet sweet pups!

events.title: 🤝 Free Live Music (Tonight)
events.description: Y’all. This patio weather is precious. Don’t waste it. Free, live music at 8:30 PM tonight & tomorrow. Two new beers on tap tomorrow: Fast As You Can, Gingerbread Porter and Rosalind, our Fall Saison! Delicious food all weekend! Come on over to Hillsborough! #ncbeer

events.title: 🤝 Mini Oktoberfest Celebration
events.description: Today’s #BeerChurch is a mini Oktoberfest celebration! We’re tapping four Oktoberfest beers: 1) Rapunzel, Oktoberfest Ale, mysterybrewing 2) Oktrophyfest, Märzen Lager, trophybrewing 3) Oktoberfest, Märzen Lager, carolinabrewingcompany 4) Oktoberfest, Märzen Lager, portcitybrew. All on tap starting at 11:30 AM! #ncbeer #vabeer #oktoberfest

events.title: 🤝 The Witness Practice (Discipleship Course)
events.description:
"Go and tell." What does it mean to be witnesses to Jesus in our world today? 

Join us on Tuesdays at 7 p.m. at The Foundry for our new Discipleship Course "The Witness Practice." We'll be walking through practical ways to live out this mission  with love and authenticty. All are welcome to join!

Come hungry for food and community. We’ve got you covered!

events.title: 🤝 On the Road Again! Sermon Series
events.description:
Practice your best Willie Nelson impression, because we’re On the Road Again! 

Join us on Sundays at 11:15 a.m. for our new sermon series! We look forward to seeing you there!

#ncchurch #chapelhillchurch #churchtiktok #sermonseries #northcarolinachurch

events.title: 🤝 Good Friday Service
events.description:
YOU'RE INVITED to a weekend filled with hope, celebration, and new life! 

Join us for any of our Easter weekend activities. All are welcome! 

Good Friday Service - Join with 6 churches across the area for an evening of worship and remembrance.
📆 Friday, April 3 at 6 p.m.
📍The Forest Theatre

Egg Hunt & Lunch - There will be food and egg hunt opportunities for ALL ages!
📆 Saturday, April 4 at 12 p.m.
📍The Foundry

Easter Sunday Worship Service - Celebrate the resurrection of Jesus and how He brings about new life! 
📆 Sunday, April 5 at 11:15 a.m.

events.description:
We have a 5th Sunday this month, so we get to gather in worship with our friends from multiple local churches! 🩵 Join us at 10 a.m. THIS Sunday at The Foundry! 

Our friends at lifechurchgo will be hosting us and St. Joseph's. We hope to see you there!

events.title: 🤝 Egg Packing Party
events.description:
Don’t put all your eggs in one basket… unless it’s at our Egg Hunt!! 🐣💐

We've got a packed Holy Week schedule with something for everybody! Bring your friends! 

Egg Packing Party - Help us pack eggs in preparation for our annual egg hunt!

events.title: 🤝 Love Chapel Hill Bracket Challenge
events.description:
For all those adding "a perfect tournament bracket" to their prayer requests... 🏀👀

Join the Love Chapel Hill Bracket Challenge and fill out brackets for both the Men’s and Women’s NCAA tournaments for a chance to win prizes! Brackets must be completed by Thursday at noon. 

Links to both challenges are on our stories! (or DM us) Password for both is "LOVE"

events.title: 🤝 Community Lunch
events.description:
Join us this Sunday after our 11:15 service for a Community Lunch!🍴🩵

We're excited to host this special gathering every third Sunday at the Foundry, where we can come together in fellowship. All are welcome and we can't wait to share this moment with you!

events.title: 🤝 Sunday Morning Church Service
events.description:
Yes, we lose an hour of sleep this weekend... but don’t worry, church is still at 11:15 a.m.!

That means there’s plenty of time to:
😴 sleep in a little
☕ grab coffee
🏀 celebrate a basketball win 👀

Whatever your Sunday morning looks like, we’ll be here ready to welcome you at 11:15 a.m.!

events.title: 🤝 Sunday Church Service
events.description:
Church isn’t a building, it’s the people! And we always have space for you 🩵
Join us on a Sundays at 11:15 a.m. or throughout the week at our discipleship courses and events! 
#chapelhillchurch #nchurch #northcarolina #chapelhill #churchtiktok

events.title: 🤝 Worship Night
events.description:
YOU'RE INVITED for a night of fellowship and lifting our voices in praise together! Join us for Worship Night this Sunday, March 1 at 6 p.m. at The Foundry (7326 Sunrise Road)! 

We’ll gather for a focused time of worship, inspiration, and intentional prayer for our nation and our local communities. This special night of worship is in partnership with the NC East District of the Wesleyan Church! We’re honored to host at The Foundry, with worship led by the Love Chapel Hill Worship Team.

events.title: 🤝 Sunday Service at The Foundry
events.description:
What an incredible and inspiring first service at The Foundry! 🩵

Thank you so much for filling the space with laughter, conversation, and worship! How about we do it again next Sunday? 👀

events.title: 🤝 An Unlikely Lent: Extraordinary People of the Easter Story
events.description:
Whether you’ve observed Lent for years or you still have questions about what it even is, we invite you to join us and learn together!

We’re intentionally journeying through Lent in our next discipleship course, An Unlikely Lent: Extraordinary People of the Easter Story, starting TONIGHT, Feb. 24 at 7 p.m. Together, we’ll explore the surprising, ordinary, and unlikely people woven into the Easter story and what we can learn from each of them. 

📆 Tuesdays at 7 p.m. at The Foundry

Bring your curiosity, your experiences, and your questions!

events.title: 🤝 First Sunday Worship Service at The Foundry
events.description:
How we feel knowing TOMORROW is our first Sunday at The Foundry (7326 Sunrise Road)! You're invited to join us at 11:15 a.m. for our worship service and then for lunch on us after! 

We're excited for everyone to see our new home base! 

#chapelhillchurch #ncchurch #churchfamily #chapelhillnc #chapelhill

events.title: 🤝 Ash Wednesday service
events.description:
Here's your sign to join us for our Ash Wednesday service!

We'll meet from 7 to 8 p.m. at The Foundry (7326 Sunrise Road) on Wednesday, Feb. 18. 

Ash Wednesday marks the beginning of the season of Lent. It is the moment we pause, get honest, and remember why we need the victory of Jesus in the first place. Come as you are as we mark this season with intention and begin our journey toward Easter together.

events.title: 🤝 High Point Rockers Games
events.description:
Last chance to root on your teams this May❕⚾️⚽️

The High Point Rockers and Carolina Core FC are bringing the energy to Truist Point Stadium in downtown High Point to close out the month.

So whether you’ve been meaning to catch your first game, need last-minute plans, or are looking for the perfect long weekend activity… this is your sign.🔥

events.location: Washington Terrace Park, 102 Gordon St, High Point, NC
events.description:
The 3rd Annual Trane Tracks Jazz Concert is happening this weekend! 🎷

This all-ages event is free, just be sure to bring your lawn chairs! Celebrate the history of jazz and explore the brand-new John Coltrane History Tour.

events.title: 🤝 Troll Photo Contest
events.description:
Something special is just around the corner… 🌳

And it’s not just our troll, Little Sally, it’s YOU with her!

We’re hosting a contest for you to share your troll photos, and yes there is a PRIZE! Whether it’s a selfie or a shot with the tripod, we want to see them all!

One lucky winner will enjoy the Troll Finger appetizer dish at jhadams_cristinagrays 🍴

Ready to start snapping? Tag us visithighpoint when you share your selfie to be entered in the contest! Winner announced April 28th.

events.title: 🤝 Carolina Core FC - International Night
events.location: Truist Point Stadium, Downtown High Point
events.description:
Vamos Foxes, the carolinacorefc season is BACK & to celebrate we’re giving away special tickets⚽️🔥
GIVEAWAY CLOSED

Head to Truist Point Stadium in Downtown High Point on Saturday, April 25th at 6:00pm for an exciting matchup. This game is part of International Night, United to the Core, so bring your friends, wear your CCFC gear, and get ready to cheer on your Foxes!🦊

We’re giving one of you the ultimate game day experience! Win a 4-top table, including 4 tickets to a corner bar table plus 2 drink tickets per person.

To enter:
1️⃣ Tag someone you’re bringing with you in the comments
2️⃣ Follow visithighpoint & carolinacore 
3️⃣ Share this post to your story for an additional entry! 

Giveaway ends Tuesday, April 21st | Winner announced on stories same day at 3:00pm. 

Gameday: Saturday, April 25th | 6:00pm
United to the Core | International Night 

#visithp #visithighpoint #carolinacore
